data.body:
OK, one more thing:

DTRPG pages are empty when they load. Then there's JavaScript that hydrates the page with data on the client side.

Which means web crawlers can't index the page or have a lot of trouble doing so.

Which means if I search for "DriveThruRPG Breathless", itch shows up but not DT 😅
